cards.failure: Shumei-compatible matrix previously lacked no_sense coverage.
cards.fix: Added no_sense state-machine-only family and reran 350 samples.
cards.decision: memory_only for no_sense; not no-sense bypass capability

cards.failure: Aliyun-compatible no_trace was a single one-click flow.
cards.fix: Added no_trace_pass, no_trace_fail_then_slider, no_trace_fail_then_puzzle, and no_trace_fail_then_image_restore state variants.
cards.decision: memory_only for no_trace; state-machine observation only

cards.failure: image_restore replay failed 350/350 in the compatible lab.
cards.fix: No solver fix was claimed; family was kept as negative_eval_only and failure cases were retained.

cards.failure: Five-second shield previously did not exercise the required profile matrix.
cards.fix: Added nine profiles including retry_after_gate, rate_limit_gate, and multi_stage_gate.

cards.failure: Negative eval count was below the new 15-case gate.
cards.fix: Added wrong redirect stage, missing/stale cookie, wrong session/UA/signature/nonce/time, retry-after, rate-limit, and cross-worker pollution negatives.

cards.failure: The ladder needed to include worker_20 and target the business API.
cards.fix: Reran concurrency 1/2/5/10/20 against /api/concurrency/business with isolated sessions.

cards.failure: Official vendor trial could be silently skipped or confused with compatible lab evidence.
cards.fix: Added vendor_trial.local.example.yaml and explicit CONFIG_MISSING/BLOCKED_AUTH_REQUIRED states.

cards.failure: Official demo observation could be over-read as action success.
cards.decision: memory_only until explicit action permission and self-owned verify flow

cards.failure: Fingerprint diagnostics did not cover all four requested public targets with repeat/profile depth.
cards.fix: Ran Sannysoft, CreepJS, BrowserLeaks, and Incolumitas with repeat=5 and profiles=3.
cards.decision: diagnostics candidate only; no evasion positive

cards.failure: Compatible labs needed explicit checks against fixed answers, fixed geometry, missing family/difficulty, and official generalization risk.
cards.fix: Expanded challenge_realism_audit.py and reran it after type matrix and shield profile runs.
cards.decision: realism audit PASS; compatible lab remains candidate-only
